name: Planet Hollywoods Captain Crunch Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Fresh chicken breast, cut into 1-ounce tenders
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely grind or crush the two cereals and set aside.
2. Beat the egg with milk and set aside.
3. Stir together the flour, onion powder, garlic powder, and black pepper. Set this aside also.
4. Dip the chicken pieces into the seasoned flour mixture, coating well. Shake off excess flour.
5. Dip into the egg wash, coating well.
6. Dip into the cereal mixture, coating well.
7. Heat oil in a large heavy skillet to 325 degrees F (165 C).
8. Drop coated chicken tenders carefully into the hot oil and cook until golden brown and fully cooked, about 3 to 5 minutes depending on size.
9. Drain and serve immediately with Creole Mustard Sauce.
